meaning: n.[律]自动放弃,放弃,弃权,弃权证书
examples: "We just need a waiver," Verlaine said.
She picked up the waiver and scanned it.
This waiver was extended in the WTO to end 2006.
But critics have pointed to India's waiver as a hollowing out of the NPT.
To apply, complete an application (downloads as a pdf) and agree to a tax waiver.
